remember: Students will be able to recall the fundamental concepts of problem-solving in computer science.
Students will be able to explain the characteristics of a good problem statement.
Students will be able to recall the different types of problem-solving techniques.
understand: Students will be able to understand the importance of problem-solving in computer science.
Students will be able to explain the role of algorithms in problem-solving.
Students will be able to understand how problem-solving techniques are applied in real-world scenarios.
apply: Students will be able to apply problem-solving techniques to solve simple problems.
Students will be able to use algorithms to solve problems.
Students will be able to design and implement a simple problem-solving strategy.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze a problem and identify the key components required to solve it.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different problem-solving techniques.
Students will be able to identify the limitations of a particular problem-solving approach.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, students will be able to understand the problem-solving process, identify problems, and develop algorithms to solve them.
Students will be able to understand the importance of problem-solving and its application in computer science.
board_exam_objectives: As per CBSE, students will be able to explain the problem-solving process, design and implement simple algorithms, and apply problem-solving techniques to solve problems.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different problem-solving approaches and identify their limitations.
